name: Fancl Corporation
summary: Fancl Corporation engages in the manufacture and sale of cosmetics and dietary supplements. It provides cosmetics, quasi-drugs, nutritional supplements, and other products in Japan and internationally. The company also offers germinated brown rice and kale juice products; develops and distributes garments and fashion goods; and distributes cosmetics and nutritional supplements. In addition, it operates as an insurance agency. The company sells its products through online and catalogue, direct store, and wholesale channels. Fancl Corporation was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Yokohama, Japan.
